TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Gabon hya' ga cyux maki' tay 1 00 S, 11 45 E na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 267,667 sq km (maki' tay 77ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 257,667 sq km, kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 10,000 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 1,738,541. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 19%, lhlahuy hya' ga 81%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 0%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Libreville. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 17 na tay mspat byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Ali Bongo Ondimba, aring ryax 16 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2009 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部
S.PHON: ɣaβon ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ taj * ** s~ɕ, ** ** e na xweʦ~ʨo s~ɕjuw. kwaraʔ kiŋħʦ~ʨijan nijaʔ ***,*** s~ɕq km (makiʔ taj **ɣinkɣan kin waħʦ~ʨiʔ) (kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ nijaʔ ɣa ***,*** s~ɕq km, kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ na laws~ɕajan ws~ɕiluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa **,*** s~ɕq km) kinkħmajan kwaraʔ s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa *,***,***. pinβʦ~ʨjan naħaʔ s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ rħzjal ħjaʔ ij pqmaħun ħjaʔ ɣa **%, lħlaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa **%, s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ s~ɕa pptzjuwaw s~ɕa βzinaħ ħjaʔ ɣa *%. s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokkaʔ s~ɕpzjaŋ naħaʔ kraħuʔ qalaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa liβre*ille. s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa ** na taj ms~ɕpat βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na qutux kawas~ɕ. mrħuw kokkaʔ mrħuw kokkaʔ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa ali βoŋo on*imβa, ariŋ rjax ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨia ***
S.FORM: Gabon hya' ga cyux maki' tay 1 00 S, 11 45 E na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 267,667 sq km (maki' tay 77ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 257,667 sq km, kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 10,000 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 1,738,541. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 19%, lhlahuy hya' ga 81%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 0%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Libreville. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 17 na tay mspat byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Ali Bongo Ondimba, aring ryax 16 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2009 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部
S.PHON: ɣaβon ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ taj * ** s~ɕ, ** ** e na xweʦ~ʨo s~ɕjuw. kwaraʔ kiŋħʦ~ʨijan nijaʔ ***,*** s~ɕq km (makiʔ taj **ɣinkɣan kin waħʦ~ʨiʔ) (kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ nijaʔ ɣa ***,*** s~ɕq km, kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ na laws~ɕajan ws~ɕiluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa **,*** s~ɕq km) kinkħmajan kwaraʔ s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa *,***,***. pinβʦ~ʨjan naħaʔ s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ rħzjal ħjaʔ ij pqmaħun ħjaʔ ɣa **%, lħlaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa **%, s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ s~ɕa pptzjuwaw s~ɕa βzinaħ ħjaʔ ɣa *%. s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokkaʔ s~ɕpzjaŋ naħaʔ kraħuʔ qalaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa liβre*ille. s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa ** na taj ms~ɕpat βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na qutux kawas~ɕ. mrħuw kokkaʔ mrħuw kokkaʔ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa ali βoŋo on*imβa, ariŋ rjax ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨia ***
